steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank appears in a relative clause where which serves as the subject. The structure is: relative pronoun subject + [blank] + direct object (detailed mathematical guidance...).

steps.title: Apply the finite verb rule
steps.content: A relative clause with a relative pronoun as subject requires a finite verb as its predicate. Provided (choice A) correctly supplies the finite verb needed here. The other choices—having provided (B), to provide (C), and providing (D)—are non-finite forms that cannot serve as the main verb in this structure. That matches choice A — A is correct.
